## Verdict
Email marketing remains the highest-ROI owned channel for B2B companies that invest in personalisation and compliance infrastructure.

## Three strongest reasons
1. Consistent ROI data across multiple independent studies and analyst reports demonstrates measurable returns
2. Direct channel ownership eliminates algorithm dependency that affects social and search channels
3. Personalisation technology has matured to the point where mid-market companies can implement effectively

## Honest concession
Privacy regulations and AI implementation complexity do create real friction and compliance costs that reduce the addressable market and increase barriers to entry for smaller organisations.

## The angle
Position email as the compounding owned channel: each compliance investment and list quality improvement creates durable competitive advantage that paid channels cannot replicate.

## What to avoid
Avoid batch-and-blast tactics, ignore-and-hope approaches to privacy compliance, and overpromising AI personalisation results to stakeholders without realistic implementation timelines.
